texto: Not strictly one of mine, but worth repeating! A very forceful old lady in these parts, when referring to the eight novels of the Angel Mountain Saga,was heard to say: "You know them books by that fellow Brian John? If I was you I wouldn't believe a single word. Take it from me. It's lies -- all lies!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Brian John que provoca temas ligados a autoestima. Ao questionar “Not strictly one of mine, but worth repeating!
